creative_brief: Clean layout with countdown timer element. Highlight the $5 refundable deposit and 48-hour deadline prominently.
subject: Last 48 hours: VIP spots closing
preheader: Only $5 to secure your place before we launch mid-2026. Fully refundable.
body:
Hi {first_name},

Today is the last chance.

Yesterday at 3pm, Sarah from Manly refreshed her phone for the third time.

She'd been watching our VIP list grow for weeks. The $5 deposit (fully refundable) seemed like nothing — but she kept hesitating.

Then she saw the update: VIP access closes in 48 hours.

Sarah realised something. She's been shopping at supermarkets her whole life, never knowing which farm her carrots came from, never meeting the people who grew her food.

FarmThru changes that. We're building NSW's first farm-direct grocery hub where you'll know exactly where your food comes from — and collect it fresh from our Brookvale hub.

No middlemen marking up prices. No mystery supply chains. Just real food from real farms, priced for everyday families.

Sarah secured her VIP spot at 3:17pm.

The question is: will you?

VIP perks include first access when we launch mid-2026, priority updates, and exclusive founder Q&As. Your $5 deposit is fully refundable — but VIP access isn't available forever.

48 hours left.
primary_text: Yesterday at 3pm, Sarah from Manly refreshed her phone for the third time.
headline: Last 48 hours: VIP spots closing
